comment: All weights must sum to 1.0. Thresholds define routing decisions.

relevance.description: How directly this maps to my active interest areas and workflows

scale.9-10: Core topic I use daily (e.g. Fabric update, DSO formula, DLD data)
scale.7-8: Adjacent but impactful (e.g. Excel feature affecting PBI users)
scale.5-6: Loosely related domain (general cloud, general finance)

practical_value.description: Can I apply this in client work or build something with it within 30 days?

scale.9-10: Changes my workflow or client deliverables immediately
scale.5-6: Good to know, possibly useful later

novelty.description: Is this genuinely new information relative to the last 90 days?

scale.9-10: Brand new announcement, first-time insight, or breaking news
scale.7-8: New angle or updated data on existing topic
scale.5-6: Recap or synthesis of known material

source_credibility.description: How authoritative and trustworthy is the source?

content_potential.description: Could this become compelling published content for LinkedIn, YouTube, training, or consulting?

scale.9-10: Counterintuitive insight, story-driven data, how-to with visual potential
scale.7-8: Useful comparison, step-by-step tutorial, industry trend with an angle
scale.5-6: Background/reference or supporting material for a post
scale.1-4: Too niche, dry, or technical for general audience

daily_digest.comment: High composite + fresh + not already seen

weekly_digest_only.comment: Good items that didn't make daily cut land in weekly digest

research_note.comment: High practical value + substantial content warrants deep-dive

wiki_candidate.comment: Item cited 3+ times OR contains definition/formula/method that stays true

content_idea.comment: High content potential + fresh angle = content idea queue
